svg.title: N-RDD2024 Bangladesh project vision and real-world impact
svg.desc: Full pipeline from 10-class detection through severity, cost, GPS and authority alerts

g.text: 19,095 images · 6 countries · D00 D10 D20 D30 D40 D50 D60 D70 D80 D90

svg.text: What it detects — 10 classes mapped to Bangladesh context

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How common are longitudinal cracks on Bangladesh highways?')
sendPrompt('What causes transverse cracks on Bangladesh roads?')
sendPrompt('Why is alligator cracking so common in Bangladesh?')
sendPrompt('How do we detect if a repair was done properly?')
sendPrompt('How severe are potholes on Bangladesh roads?')
sendPrompt('What is the impact of faded pedestrian crossings in Bangladesh?')
sendPrompt('Why are manhole covers a safety hazard in Dhaka?')
sendPrompt('How does patchy road relate to monsoon damage in Bangladesh?')
sendPrompt('What causes rutting on Bangladesh roads?')
sendPrompt('What BD-specific additions improve the model for Bangladesh?')

svg.text: Pipeline outputs — what gets generated per image/video

g.text: Why YOLOv11l — the right model choice
C3K2 backbone · SPFF neck · 25% fewer params than YOLOv8l · faster convergence
100 epochs · cosine LR · mosaic aug · multi-scale · expected mAP@50 > 65%
